name: Create a launch audit from a public URL
description: A release owner can start an audit for ShipShape, enter a bare public domain, and reach the checks workspace.

planSteps.description: Open https://shipshape-pi.vercel.app/ and choose Start Audit.
Verify the app navigates to the Create audit screen and exposes App name, Live URL, and Generate controls.
Enter ShipShape demo as the app name and example.com as the Live URL, then submit Generate.
Verify the submitted target is normalized to https://example.com and the user reaches the checks workspace without a blank or stuck state.
